tasks.label: Build Factorio Launcher
args: curl -L -o "res\factorio.ico" "https://github.com/marnason/factorio-icon/releases/latest/download/factorio.ico" && if not exist build mkdir build && "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\BuildTools\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvars64.bat" && rc /nologo /fo "build\app.res" "res\app.rc" && cl /nologo /O2 /W4 /MT /Fe:"build\factorio-icon-launcher.exe" "src\main.c" "build\app.res" /link /SUBSYSTEM:WINDOWS
